name: macos-install-prep
description: Licensed macOS bootable installer / recovery plan (Apple 101578; no piracy)

steps.text: Apple: https://support.apple.com/en-nz/101578 createinstallmedia. Skill: macos-install-prep. USB volume MyVolume is erased. No Hackintosh, no pirate installers.

steps.prompt: Using skill macos-install-prep and knowledge/macos/ (bootable-installer.md, reinstall-and-recovery.md), produce: (1) verdict (2) method-chooser: upgrade vs recovery vs bootable USB (3) if USB: bootable-installer-plan with erase warning and createinstallmedia-guide — only official command patterns for user-stated macOS name, VERIFY LIVE on https://support.apple.com/en-nz/101578 (4) boot-from-installer silicon vs Intel (5) preflight-checklist (6) refuse Hackintosh, cracked ISOs, Activation Lock bypass. Not legal advice. Apple terms apply.
